data.title: Blackrose Finbitnex is an AI-powered trading platform for cryptocurrency, supporting various digital assets. It offers automated trading, demo accounts, and secure features. The platform delivers real-time analytics, precision execution, and security measures. Users can register with a minimum deposit of $250, verify their accounts, practice with demo mode, and then trade live with AI-powered strategies. Blackrose Finbitnex operates with continuous monitoring, customization, and efficiency to bridge manual and automated trading.
data.description: Blackrose Finbitnex is a next-generation trading platform based in New York City, leveraging AI and algorithms to monitor global cryptocurrency markets 24/7. The platform caters to both beginners and professionals, supporting a wide range of digital assets. It offers demo accounts for practice trading and features including multi-exchange compatibility, risk management tools, and secure deposit methods. The platform prioritizes security, employing bank-grade encryption and two-factor authentication. It provides verified performance data and historical metrics to showcase its operational efficiency. Users can start with a minimum deposit of $250, engage in demo trading, and then move on to live trading with AI-powered strategies. Blackrose Finbitnex operates as a fully automated trading platform, continuously scanning exchanges for trade opportunities and allowing users to customize trading preferences. The platform provides visual analytics, portfolio tracking, and notifications for informed decision-making. It offers simulated trading environments for risk-free strategy testing. The transparent and secure platform balances cutting-edge AI functionality with robust security protocols, making it an attractive option for both novice and professional cryptocurrency traders.

data.title: Famed Texan oil tycoon Oscar S. Wyatt Jr., known for Coastal Corp., dies at 101 after scandals, including prison time.
data.description: A former energy mogul who grew his Coastal Corporation into a billion-dollar empire through the sale of energy products found himself in the spotlight for forging relationships with world leaders. However, his downfall came when he was convicted for giving bribes to the Iraqi government.

data.title: Reko International Group Inc. (TSX-V: REKO) saw sales decrease by $2.1M (4.8%), gross profit increase by $2.9M (66.8%), earnings per share at $0.19 (compared to loss of $0.70), adjusted earnings per share at $0.39 (compared to loss of $0.13), and adjusted EBITDA of $6.0M in Fiscal 2025.
data.description: Reko International Group Inc. (TSX-V: REKO) has released its financial results for the period ending on July 31, 2025, in Windsor, Ontario. Highlights from the fiscal year 2025 report include a $2.1 million decline in sales, representing a 4.8% decrease from the previous year. The company experienced a significant improvement in gross profit, which increased by $2.9 million or 66.8% compared to the prior year. Earnings per share showed a positive shift to $0.19 from a loss of ($0.70) per share in the previous year. Adjusted earnings per share also improved to $0.39 from ($0.13) per share in the same period. Additionally, the company reported an adjusted EBITDA of $6.0 million.

data.title: Dialpad introduces new Agentic AI Platform to automate customer service with autonomous voice and text agents.
data.description: In San Francisco, Dialpad unveiled its new Agentic AI Platform to empower businesses in creating autonomous AI agents for voice and text interactions. This platform is designed to comprehend intricate requests, navigate through multi-step processes, and seamlessly carry out tasks across various systems using secure connectors. The platform utilizes reusable Skills and Workflows to automate customer journeys like scheduling, order inquiries, and lead generation. This innovation aims to enhance operational efficiency and customer experience.

data.title: Yodlee's new subsidiary Yodlee Credit, LLC becomes a Credit Reporting Agency (CRA) following necessary steps in Raleigh, N.C.
data.description: Yodlee, Inc., based in Raleigh, North Carolina, has reported that its subsidiary, Yodlee Credit, LLC, has fulfilled all requirements to function as a Credit Reporting Agency (CRA).

data.title: Experian sponsors 2025 Hall of Fame Series Los Angeles event on Nov 14 at Intuit Dome.
data.description: Experian® has recently announced its sponsorship of the 2025 Hall of Fame Series Los Angeles event, taking place on November 14 at the Intuit Dome. The event is set to be a significant occasion, with Experian® playing a key role as the title sponsor.

data.title: Zilch reveals new products at Summit, including Zilch Intelligent Commerce, to boost growth. 150+ participants attended.
data.description: In London, the consumer payments platform Zilch announced significant product advancements during its inaugural Zilch Summit with 150 retailers and technology experts. The unveiling included Zilch Intelligent Commerce, an AI-driven data intelligence platform designed to enhance retailers' ROI when collaborating with Zilch. This marks a pivotal moment in the company's growth trajectory.

data.title: ACI survey finds 79% households miss chances to reduce illness spread during cold & flu season; only 22% adjust routines.
data.description: In the United States, a survey by the American Cleaning Institute (ACI) shows that 79% of households miss important chances to minimize illness spread through proactive cleaning measures, leaving themselves vulnerable during the cold and flu season. Although 72% of Americans alter their cleaning routines in some way during this season, only 22% consistently adjust their habits throughout the whole season - a decrease from 27% in 2024, as revealed by the survey.

data.title: FDA approves Regeneron's Libtayo for reducing recurrence risk in skin cancer patients, based on Phase 3 trial data. EU decision by 2026.
data.description: The FDA has granted approval to Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc.'s PD-1 inhibitor Libtayo for use as an adjuvant therapy in adult patients with high-risk cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma (CSCC) post-surgery and radiation. The drug was assessed under Priority Review. A regulatory application is pending in the EU with a decision anticipated by the first half of 2026. The FDA's decision was influenced by data from the Phase 3 C-POST trial. Regeneron has also reported positive results from a Phase 3 study involving patients with an ultra-rare genetic disorder. For the complete story, refer to the original article.

data.title: Bon Bon Bum® and Tajín® collaborate on zesty-sweet lollipops. Unique candy experience launched in Houston, Oct. 9, 2025.
data.description: In a recent collaboration, two popular brands have come together to offer a unique candy experience. Bon Bon Bum®, the well-known bubblegum-filled lollipop from Colombina, and Tajín®, the beloved chile-lime seasoning, have united to create a distinctive flavor combination. This partnership is set to bring a new and bold taste sensation to consumers. The collaboration was announced on October 9, 2025, in Houston. Stay tuned for this exciting mashup of flavors hitting the market soon.
